About Dr Lolo

Beauty Products Made for Everyday Confidence

Dr Lolo Cosmetics is a Tanzanian cosmetics brand based in Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam, offering a growing collection of beauty, glow, skincare, and personal care products. The brand is built around confidence, elegance, and accessibility.

Founded by Ritha, Dr Lolo Cosmetics continues to serve customers through its physical shop and online platforms, making it easy to discover products, ask questions, and place orders directly through WhatsApp or social media.

Learn More About Us

Premium Quality

Carefully selected skincare and glow products for a radiant look.

Natural Beauty

Products designed to help you feel confident every day.

Trusted Brand

Growing through customer trust and social media presence.

Popular Product Lines

Discover our most loved products, trusted by customers across Tanzania.

Rapid Glow Serum

A green bottle serum from the Dr Lolo Rapid Glow collection, designed as part of a beauty routine for customers who love a radiant skincare look.

Rapid Glow Lotion

A green pump bottle product from the Rapid Glow range, ideal for daily body care routines.

Check Availability

Whitening Oil

A golden oil product that can be presented as part of Dr Lolo's skincare and glow range.

Ask for Price

Pink Glow Set

A pink-themed product collection including cream and serum options, created for customers who love a soft, feminine beauty set.

View Set

Gold Glow Set

A luxury-inspired gold collection including body and skincare products with a premium look.

Order Set

Rana Slimming Product

A specialty product available under the Dr Lolo product range. Customers can contact the shop for current availability and guidance.

Ask on WhatsApp
Our Products

Explore Our Glow Collection

From serums and lotions to creams, oils, soaps, shower gels, and beauty sets, Dr Lolo Cosmetics offers a wide range of products designed for people who love a clean, polished, and radiant look.

Rapid Glow Collection

A signature Dr Lolo product line featuring glow-focused skincare products such as serum, lotion, oil, cream, and soap options.

View Rapid Glow

Pink Glow Collection

A bright and feminine product range with pink-themed creams, serums, and full set options for customers who love a soft luxury beauty look.

View Pink Glow

Gold Glow Collection

A premium-inspired product range with a rich gold aesthetic, ideal for customers who prefer a luxurious skincare and body care experience.

View Gold Collection

Body Care & Shower Products

Products such as shower gels, lotions, oils, and body creams for daily self-care and beauty routines.

Shop Body Care

Beauty Sets

Full product sets curated for customers who want a complete routine in one package.

Ask for Available Sets

Specialty Products

Selected products such as slimming powders, soaps, serums, and creams available depending on stock.

Check Availability

Why Customers Choose Dr Lolo Cosmetics

Wide Product Variety

We offer a broad selection of cosmetics and beauty products, including skincare, body care, oils, creams, serums, soaps, and full sets.

Easy WhatsApp Ordering

Customers can quickly ask questions, check availability, and place orders directly through WhatsApp.

Located in Kariakoo

Visit our shop in Dar es Salaam at Kariakoo, Mafia and Jangwani Street.

Trusted Beauty Brand

Dr Lolo Cosmetics continues to grow through customer trust, social media presence, and accessible beauty products.

Founder-Led Brand

Founded by Ritha, the brand is built with a personal touch and direct customer care.

Social Media Active

Follow Dr Lolo Cosmetics on Instagram, Threads, and TikTok via @drlolo_product.

Meet the Founder

Founded by Ritha

Dr Lolo Cosmetics was founded by Ritha, with a vision to make beauty products more accessible, stylish, and easy to discover for customers in Tanzania. Through the Dr Lolo Cosmetics shop and online platforms, customers can explore different product options, ask questions, and receive guidance before placing their orders.

Her goal is to build a trusted beauty destination where customers can explore products, ask questions, and receive support before purchasing.

Follow @drlolo_product

Dr Lolo Cosmetics is a Tanzanian beauty and cosmetics brand offering skincare, body care, glow products, oils, serums, creams, soaps, and beauty sets from Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam.
